revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-1-335

Vision by the normal eye when adapted to levels of luminance below some hundredths of a candela per square metre.

Note: The rod receptors in the retina are considered to be the principal active elements under these conditions. The spectrum appears uncoloured and the maximum luminous efficiency is shifted to a shorter wavelength than in photopic vision.

Reference: C.I.E.

{{IALAFooter}}
